message:
fix(demo_showcase): add missing app.log fixture to git

The .gitignore had *.log which excluded the fixture log file
needed by include_str! at compile time. Added an exception for
fixture logs and tracked the file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,8 @@ Thumbs.db
 
 # Debug
 *.log
+# But keep fixture log files for demo_showcase
+!crates/demo_showcase/assets/fixtures/logs/*.log
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
